meta.title: DXBiz - Digital transformation for Vietnamese businesses
meta.description: A software suite for management, sales and automation for small and medium businesses in Vietnam. Includes DXFlow, OrderHub, PageHub and SEOHub.

hero.badge: A software suite for small & medium businesses
hero.title: A complete software suite for Vietnamese businesses
hero.subtitle: DXBiz brings together products for management and automation — from operations and orders to sales pages and SEO — helping small and medium businesses digitize and grow faster.
hero.imgAlt: DXBiz dashboard showing business operations metrics

products.title: Multiple products, one ecosystem
products.subtitle: Each product solves a specific business problem and connects seamlessly under one DXBiz account.

items.name: DXFlow
items.description: An AI assistant for work — automates processes and connects with a wide range of software you already use, not just DXBiz's own products.

items.name: OrderHub
items.description: Manage orders and omnichannel sales in one place, with inventory and shipping synced in real time.

items.name: PageHub
items.description: Build and manage professional landing and sales pages — no coding required.

items.name: SEOHub
items.description: Track and optimize search rankings to grow organic traffic to your website.

features.title: Everything in one ecosystem, no more disconnected tools
features.subtitle: Instead of juggling separate apps, DXBiz brings every product into one place — shared data, one login.

items.title: Automation
items.description: Run repetitive tasks, automate approval flows and internal reminders, cutting manual work every day.

items.title: Reports & Analytics
items.description: Consolidate sales, inventory and customer data in real time so you can make decisions based on data.

items.title: Connect & Sync
items.description: Deep integration with Vietnam's ecosystem: Sapo, MISA, GHN, VietQR. Data stays in sync across products instantly.

solutions.title: Tailored solutions for every industry
solutions.subtitle: Every industry has its own quirks; DXBiz is built to adapt and optimize for each specific workflow.
solutions.spaDesc: Automate 90% of booking, reminders and returning-customer care via Zalo OA.
solutions.spaImgAlt: Spa staff using DXBiz software at the reception desk

items.title: Retail
items.description: Accurate inventory, stock forecasting and instant GHN/AhaMove shipping integration.

items.title: Marketing agency
items.description: Centralized project management, automated reporting and efficient staff allocation.

partners.label: Trusted by and integrated with Vietnam's leading platforms

testimonials.title: Trusted by small and medium businesses to run every day
testimonials.subtitle: From spas and retail to marketing agencies — DXBiz helps thousands of teams do less and achieve more.

items.quote: DXFlow replaced almost all of our reminder and returning-customer care work. Our receptionists now focus on serving guests at the counter, and our return rate has clearly increased.
Real-time inventory sync between Sapo and our actual warehouse ended our overselling problems. End-of-day reports run themselves — no more manual data entry.
The software assigns tasks and compiles campaign reports for each client automatically. The team is far less stressed, and we've taken on more projects without rushing to hire.

cta.title: Ready to level up your business?
cta.subtitle: Join 1,000+ small and medium businesses already operating more efficiently with DXBiz.
